title: Roguelock
description: The official modpack for Roguelock, a combination of Roguecraft and Chunklock.
body:
Welcome to the **Roguelock** Modpack!
This modpack aims to combine two datapacks together for a fun and interesting gameplay!

These two datapacks that were combined are **Roguecraft** and **Chunklock**.

**Chunklock** is a datapack that locks every chunk behind a paywall,
while **Roguecraft** aims to turn Minecraft into a roguelidt.

And with this modpack, you can play both datapacks in the same world upon creation.
it's a fun and great challenge that anyone can try!

Creators of both **Roguecraft** and **Chunklock** is Monocode(Roguecraft) and Qullbee(Chunklock), and they have allowed me to make this modpack featuring the two datapacks together.


**Bonus!!**
Me and my pal Skiz are also recording this challenge, on which you can see in this playlist.
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9XYvKJEF8E_C0lOi2LhaAPhgMiSVK6IY
